data.revised_prompt: Create a clean HD 2D game character concept illustration for a cultivation roguelite: a cuter, more chibi-like female xianxia cultivator for 'Samsara Ascension'. Character only, full body visible, three-quarter RPG view, centered composition with generous padding, clear feet anchor, occupying about 58% of the canvas. Chibi proportions around 2.5 to 3 heads tall, slightly rounded silhouette, larger head, simplified outfit layers for small-size readability. Cute young female cultivator with long dark ink hair, one simple jade hair ornament, a small forehead gem, white and pale-jade silk robes with a few soft teal ribbons and light gold trim, smooth minimal decoration, polished jade accessory details, short jade sword held close to the body, tiny restrained qi aura. Hand-painted fantasy quality but clean, crisp silhouette, simplified details, soft facial features, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Warm elegant celestial mood with subtle readable edge lighting. Palette: white, pale jade, teal, warm gold, dark ink hair; avoid magenta in the character. Background must be perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key only, one uniform color, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation. No text, no UI, no watermark, no extra characters, no clutter, no giant aura, no dense embroidery, no heavy jewelry, no giant ribbons, no realistic anatomy, no tall fashion proportions, no dark horror tone, no messy silhouette.
